**SaaSofSaaSs (SoSS) Engine - AI Index**
This file provides a map for AI crawlers and search engines to understand the SoSS multi-tenant factory.

**Project Metadata**
- Framework: Next.js 16.2
- Architecture: Feature-Sliced Design (FSD)
- Primary Domain: saasofsaass.com
- Pilot Project: Àgora (Charity/Social Work)

**Documentation Roots**
- Master Context: Vision and Core AI Rules. (aiContexts\0-global\.ai-context.md)
- Routing Manual: DNS Matrix and Middleware Logic. (/aiContexts/1-architechture/.routing.md)
- Feature: Paywall: Monetization logic.(aiContexts/3-features/paywall/.ai-paywall.md)
- Feature: Translations: 11-language engine.(aiContexts/src/3-features/translations/.ai-translations.md)

**Code Standards**
- See AGENTS.md for internal coding protocols. (./AGENTS.md)
- See Block Contract for data structures. (./4-entities/block/model/types.ts)
